name: NVMe Storage Node
description: Ubuntu 22.04 with auto-detection of all NVMe devices, formatted ext4, mounted at /mnt/nvme0, /mnt/nvme1, etc. with persistent fstab entries. Add NVME_P4510 components to the node.

commands.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nvme-cli

COUNTER=0; for dev in $(lsblk -d -n -o NAME,TYPE | awk '$2=="disk" && $1~/^nvme/ {print $1}'); do MOUNT="/mnt/nvme${COUNTER}"; echo "Formatting /dev/${dev} as ext4 -> ${MOUNT}"; sudo mkfs.ext4 -F "/dev/${dev}"; sudo mkdir -p "${MOUNT}"; sudo mount "/dev/${dev}" "${MOUNT}"; sudo chown $(whoami):$(whoami) "${MOUNT}"; grep -q "/dev/${dev}" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/${dev}  ${MOUNT}  ext4  defaults,nofail  0  2" | sudo tee -a /etc/fstab > /dev/null; COUNTER=$((COUNTER + 1)); done; echo "${COUNTER} NVMe device(s) formatted and mounted"
